sentences.sentence: I turn on the light in my kitchen that night, and then I see it.
sentences.translation: 那天晚上，我打开厨房的灯，随后便看到了它。

structure.text: I turn on the light in my kitchen that night

difficult_points: and then 连接按时间先后发生的两个动作。
it 暂不明说对象，为后文揭示蟑螂制造悬念。

sentences.sentence: I draw back, and my first instinct is to scream.
sentences.translation: 我向后退缩，第一反应就是尖叫。

structure.text: and my first instinct is to scream

difficult_points: draw back 表示因惊吓而后退。
to scream 是不定式作表语，说明 instinct 的内容。

sentences.sentence: I control myself with difficulty, but find myself shuddering, unable to deal with the creature before me.
sentences.translation: 我勉强控制住自己，却发现自己仍在发抖，无法面对眼前的生物。

structure.text: unable to deal with the creature before me

difficult_points: find oneself doing 表示发现自己处于某状态。
unable ... 是形容词短语，补充说明主语状态。

sentences.sentence: It's only a cockroach, but its large size, long antennae, shiny appearance, and spiny legs, all present a particularly disgusting appearance.
sentences.translation: 它不过是一只蟑螂，但硕大的体型、长长的触角、油亮的外表和带刺的腿，共同构成了格外恶心的模样。

structure.text: but its large size, long antennae, shiny appearance, and spiny legs
all present a particularly disgusting appearance

difficult_points: but 对比“只是一只蟑螂”与其引发的强烈厌恶。
all 是主语同位强调，指前面列举的四种特征。

sentences.sentence: And this is not just to me, but to everyone it seems, even to the point of phobic responses.
sentences.translation: 而且似乎不只我如此，人人都有这种感觉，甚至会产生恐惧症式反应。

structure.text: this is not just to me, but to everyone
even to the point of phobic responses

difficult_points: not just ... but ... 连接厌恶感所涉及的人群。
to the point of 表示达到某种程度。

sentences.sentence: This is certainly the over-riding reason I want these creatures totally eradicated from my apartment, but with their offensive odour, passive transportation of microbes, and trails of droppings, they also pose a distinct threat to domestic hygiene.
sentences.translation: 这当然是我想把它们从公寓彻底清除的首要原因；不过，它们难闻的气味、对微生物的被动携带以及留下的粪便痕迹，也对居家卫生构成明确威胁。

structure.text: This is certainly the over-riding reason
I want these creatures totally eradicated from my apartment
but with their offensive odour, passive transportation of microbes, and trails of droppings
they also pose a distinct threat to domestic hygiene

difficult_points: reason 后省略关系词 why；want + 宾语 + 过去分词表示希望它们被清除。
with 短语列出卫生威胁来源。

sentences.sentence: Clearly, cohabitation is not possible.
sentences.translation: 显然，彼此共处是不可能的。
difficult_points: cohabitation 在此幽默地指人与蟑螂同住。
Clearly 是句子副词，表达作者明确立场。

sentences.sentence: So, I do all I can to keep these pests away.
sentences.translation: 所以，我竭尽所能不让这些害虫靠近。
difficult_points: I can 是省略 that 的定语从句，修饰 all。
keep ... away 表示不让某物接近。

sentences.sentence: Food is stored in sealed containers, garbage cans have tight lids, my kitchen is kept spotlessly clean, and my apartment swept and mopped nightly.
sentences.translation: 食物存放在密封容器中，垃圾桶盖得很严，厨房保持一尘不染，公寓每晚都清扫拖洗。

structure.text: Food is stored in sealed containers
my kitchen is kept spotlessly clean
and my apartment swept and mopped nightly

difficult_points: 四个并列分句列举防虫措施。
最后一项省略 is，完整结构为 my apartment is swept and mopped。

sentences.sentence: I have also sealed up possible entry points, but still, these loathsome things find their way inside.
sentences.translation: 我还封住了所有可能入口，可这些讨厌的东西仍能钻进屋里。

structure.text: I have also sealed up possible entry points
these loathsome things find their way inside

difficult_points: but still 强调措施与结果相反。
find one's way inside 表示设法进入。

sentences.sentence: I need a way to kill them.
sentences.translation: 我需要一种杀死它们的办法。
difficult_points: to kill them 修饰 a way。
them 指进入公寓的蟑螂。

sentences.sentence: The most precise cockroach killer is, typically, another insect.
sentences.translation: 通常，杀灭蟑螂最精准的杀手是另一种昆虫。
difficult_points: typically 是插入语。
killer 在此指捕食蟑螂的生物。

sentences.sentence: A specific species of wasp targets these creatures.
sentences.translation: 一种特定的黄蜂专门捕猎这些生物。
difficult_points: target 作动词，表示把蟑螂作为捕猎对象。
these creatures 回指 cockroaches。

sentences.sentence: With a quick accurate swoop, it bites the cockroach at the main nerve centre of its body, which results in a temporary paralysis.
sentences.translation: 它快速而准确地俯冲，在蟑螂身体的主要神经中枢处咬上一口，从而造成暂时麻痹。

structure.text: it bites the cockroach at the main nerve centre of its body
which results in a temporary paralysis

difficult_points: it 指 wasp，its 指 cockroach。
which 回指咬中神经中枢这一整件事。

sentences.sentence: This is very necessary, as we all know just how fast cockroaches can run.
sentences.translation: 这一步非常必要，因为我们都知道蟑螂跑得有多快。

structure.text: as we all know just how fast cockroaches can run

difficult_points: This 指使蟑螂暂时麻痹。
how fast 从句作 know 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: The wasp has only a few minutes to prepare its next sting, in the exact area of the brain which controls the cockroaches' instinct to escape.
sentences.translation: 黄蜂只有几分钟准备下一次蜇刺，目标是大脑中精确控制蟑螂逃跑本能的区域。

structure.text: The wasp has only a few minutes
in the exact area of the brain
which controls the cockroaches' instinct to escape

difficult_points: to prepare 修饰 minutes，表示可用时间。
which 修饰 area；to escape 修饰 instinct。

sentences.sentence: After the paralysis departs, the cockroach is subdued and docile, and doomed.
sentences.translation: 麻痹消退后，蟑螂变得顺从温驯，也注定难逃一死。

structure.text: the cockroach is subdued and docile, and doomed

difficult_points: After 从句说明状态变化时间。
subdued、docile、doomed 是并列表语。

sentences.sentence: The wasp bites off the antennae to further discourage flight, then drags its victim away.
sentences.translation: 黄蜂咬掉触角以进一步阻止蟑螂逃跑，然后把猎物拖走。

structure.text: The wasp bites off the antennae

difficult_points: to ... 表示咬掉触角的目的。
drags 前省略主语 The wasp。

sentences.sentence: Faced with such predation, cockroaches usually conceal themselves during the day, and with their ability to flatten their bodies, they can disappear into just about any tiny nook, crevice, and cranny.
sentences.translation: 面对这种捕食，蟑螂白天通常藏起来；凭借压扁身体的能力，它们几乎能钻进任何细小角落和缝隙。

structure.text: cockroaches usually conceal themselves during the day
with their ability to flatten their bodies
they can disappear into just about any tiny nook, crevice, and cranny

difficult_points: Faced with ... 的逻辑主语是 cockroaches。
nook, crevice, and cranny 近义叠用，强调各种细小缝隙。

sentences.sentence: There, they wait patiently for darkness before emerging to search for food, and will usually run away when exposed to light.
sentences.translation: 它们在那里耐心等待黑暗，随后出来觅食；一旦暴露在光线下通常就会逃走。

structure.text: before emerging to search for food

difficult_points: before 后接动名词，to search 表示出来的目的。
when exposed ... 省略 they are。

sentences.sentence: Given this, I am told that the slim and agile house centipede is probably the most effective cockroach predator, able to track down and root out the most carefully hidden prey.
sentences.translation: 鉴于此，有人告诉我，身形纤细敏捷的蚰蜒可能是最有效的蟑螂天敌，能够追踪并挖出藏得最严密的猎物。

structure.text: that the slim and agile house centipede is probably the most effective cockroach predator
able to track down and root out the most carefully hidden prey

difficult_points: Given this 表示考虑到前述藏匿习性。
able ... 修饰 centipede，track down 与 root out 并列。

sentences.sentence: Unfortunately, I would say that centipedes are even more disgusting to have in one's house, if that's possible.
sentences.translation: 不幸的是，我得说，在家里看到蚰蜒甚至更加恶心——如果还能更恶心的话。

structure.text: that centipedes are even more disgusting to have in one's house

difficult_points: that 从句作 say 的宾语；to have ... 修饰 disgusting 的情境。
if that's possible 带有幽默夸张意味。

sentences.sentence: I just can't win this game.
sentences.translation: 这场斗争我怎么都赢不了。
difficult_points: this game 比喻消灭蟑螂的困境。
just 加强无奈语气。

sentences.sentence: Can anyone win?
sentences.translation: 有人能赢吗？
difficult_points: 情态动词 Can 前置构成一般疑问句。
anyone 把作者个人困境扩展为普遍问题。

sentences.sentence: These insects are just about the hardiest, on the planet.
sentences.translation: 这些昆虫几乎是地球上最顽强的生物。
difficult_points: just about 表示几乎。
原文 hardiest 后有不必要逗号，须保留。

sentences.sentence: Some can wait for up to three months before meals, some can survive on the barest hint of nutrition (such as the glue on the back of postage stamps), and some can live without air for over half an hour.
sentences.translation: 有些蟑螂能三个月不进食，有些仅凭极少营养就能存活（例如邮票背面的胶），还有些能在无空气条件下活半小时以上。

structure.text: Some can wait for up to three months before meals
some can survive on the barest hint of nutrition
such as the glue on the back of postage stamps
and some can live without air for over half an hour

difficult_points: 三个 some 分句并列，列举不同生存能力。
the barest hint of 强调营养量极少。

expressions.text: survive on the barest hint of nutrition

sentences.sentence: They do not, however, handle cold weather well, preferring the warm conditions and security found within buildings.
sentences.translation: 不过，它们不善于应对寒冷天气，更喜欢建筑物内温暖而安全的环境。

structure.text: preferring the warm conditions and security found within buildings

difficult_points: preferring ... 补充主语的偏好。
found within buildings 修饰 conditions and security。

sentences.sentence: Hidden there, the female lays egg capsules containing around 40 eggs, and with the insect's relatively long lifespan (about a year), some 300 to 400 offspring can ultimately be produced.
sentences.translation: 雌蟑螂藏在建筑物内，产下每个约含40枚卵的卵鞘；加上它相对较长的寿命（约一年），最终可繁殖300至400只后代。

structure.text: with the insect's relatively long lifespan (about a year)
some 300 to 400 offspring can ultimately be produced

difficult_points: Hidden there 修饰 female；containing ... 修饰 egg capsules。
with 短语说明高繁殖量的背景，some 在数字前表示大约。

sentences.sentence: The result: once these insects have infested a building, they are very difficult to eradicate.
sentences.translation: 结果是：一旦这些昆虫侵入一座建筑，就很难将它们彻底清除。

structure.text: once these insects have infested a building
they are very difficult to eradicate

difficult_points: 冒号后说明繁殖能力导致的结果。
they are difficult to eradicate 是主语提升结构，语义上它们是被清除对象。

sentences.sentence: Cockroaches do, however, have some subtleties.
sentences.translation: 不过，蟑螂确实也有一些精妙之处。
difficult_points: do 强调 have。
subtleties 指其行为与交流并非简单粗陋。

sentences.sentence: They leave chemical messages in their droppings, as well as emit airborne pheromones to signal other cockroaches about sources of food and water, and alert them to their own presence.
sentences.translation: 它们在粪便中留下化学信息，还释放空气传播的信息素，向其他蟑螂传达食物和水源，并告知自身存在。

structure.text: They leave chemical messages in their droppings
as well as emit airborne pheromones
to signal other cockroaches about sources of food and water, and alert them to their own presence

difficult_points: leave 与 emit 由 as well as 连接。
to signal 和 alert 是并列目的动作。

sentences.sentence: The latter is more important, for these insects are actually somewhat gregarious.
sentences.translation: 后者更为重要，因为这些昆虫其实有一定群居性。

structure.text: for these insects are actually somewhat gregarious

difficult_points: The latter 指告知其他蟑螂自身存在。
for 引导原因分句；gregarious 表示群居。

sentences.sentence: Research has shown that cockroaches make group-based decisions, and tend to co-operate.
sentences.translation: 研究表明，蟑螂会作出群体决策，也倾向于合作。

structure.text: that cockroaches make group-based decisions, and tend to co-operate

difficult_points: that 从句作 shown 的宾语。
make 与 tend 是共用主语 cockroaches 的并列谓语。

sentences.sentence: One study placed a large number of cockroaches in a dish with three small shelters, and the insects divided themselves equally between two of them, leaving the third one empty.
sentences.translation: 一项研究把大量蟑螂放进有三个小躲避处的容器中，它们平均分进其中两个，留下第三个空着。

structure.text: One study placed a large number of cockroaches in a dish with three small shelters
and the insects divided themselves equally between two of them

difficult_points: place + 宾语 + 地点说明实验设置。
leaving ... 表示分配后的结果，one 代替 shelter。

sentences.sentence: When these shelters were exchanged for two very large ones, all the cockroaches arranged themselves in just one.
sentences.translation: 当这些躲避处换成两个很大的躲避处时，所有蟑螂都聚到其中一个里面。

structure.text: When these shelters were exchanged for two very large ones
all the cockroaches arranged themselves in just one

difficult_points: be exchanged for 表示被替换成。
ones/one 都代替 shelters/shelter。

sentences.sentence: These creatures, it seems, prefer the company of others, and a rather fair al location of resources.
sentences.translation: 这些生物似乎偏爱同伴，也偏好相当公平的资源分配。

structure.text: prefer the company of others, and a rather fair al location of resources

difficult_points: it seems 是插入语；prefer 后有两个并列宾语。
原文 al location 很可能是 allocation 的错误分词，须保留。

sentences.sentence: Should I therefore feel any admiration?
sentences.translation: 那么，我是否应该产生一点钦佩？
difficult_points: Should 前置构成疑问句。
therefore 承接蟑螂的社会性和合作行为。

sentences.sentence: It is hard - in fact, in Western culture, cockroaches are almost universally depicted as repulsive and dirty pests.
sentences.translation: 这很难——事实上，在西方文化中，蟑螂几乎普遍被描绘成令人厌恶的肮脏害虫。

structure.text: cockroaches are almost universally depicted as repulsive and dirty pests

difficult_points: It 指对蟑螂产生钦佩。
破折号后解释为何很难，be depicted as 是被动结构。

sentences.sentence: In the insect's most famous literary appearance - Franz Kafka's 'The Metamorphosis' - a man, Gregor, is transformed overnight into a monstrous insect, probably a cockroach (although the story never quite makes that clear).Gregor's transformation results in very predictable responses from his family and friends, who can never accept him again.
sentences.translation: 在这种昆虫最著名的文学亮相——弗兰茨·卡夫卡的《变形记》中——格里高尔一夜之间变成一只可怕昆虫，很可能是蟑螂（尽管故事并未完全说清）。格里高尔的变化引发家人朋友完全可预料的反应，他们再也无法接受他。

structure.text: a man, Gregor, is transformed overnight into a monstrous insect, probably a cockroach
although the story never quite makes that clear
Gregor's transformation results in very predictable responses from his family and friends
who can never accept him again

difficult_points: Gregor 与 a man 同位，probably a cockroach 补充 monstrous insect。
who 修饰 family and friends。原文 clear).Gregor 之间没有空格，须保留为同一 Block。

sentences.sentence: He eventually dies, outcast and lonely, despised and mistreated - a potent symbol of alienation and rejection.
sentences.translation: 他最终在被排斥、孤独、受鄙视和虐待中死去——成为疏离与拒斥的强烈象征。

structure.text: outcast and lonely, despised and mistreated
a potent symbol of alienation and rejection

difficult_points: 四个形容词/分词补充死亡时的状态。
破折号后是对人物命运的同位概括。

sentences.sentence: Yet in the Pixar animated feature 'Wall-E', a cockroach provides essential companionship to a lone robot living on a planet scorched by a nuclear holocaust.
sentences.translation: 然而在皮克斯动画片《机器人总动员》中，一只蟑螂为独自在核灾难灼毁的星球上生活的机器人提供了不可或缺的陪伴。

structure.text: a cockroach provides essential companionship to a lone robot

difficult_points: living ... 修饰 robot；scorched ... 修饰 planet。
Yet 对比文学中令人厌弃与动画中陪伴者的形象。

expressions.meaning_zh: 为……提供不可或缺的陪伴

sentences.sentence: Whatever the case, I am faced with a big problem: a large ugly cockroach crawling slowly across my sink, antennae waving as it explores around.
sentences.translation: 不管怎样，我正面对一个大问题：一只又大又丑的蟑螂缓慢爬过水槽，探索四周时触角不停摆动。

structure.text: I am faced with a big problem
a large ugly cockroach crawling slowly across my sink
antennae waving as it explores around

difficult_points: 冒号后具体说明 big problem。
antennae waving 是独立主格，as 从句说明摆动时的动作。

sentences.sentence: If I try to grab it, it will dart away, and I doubt whether I'll be able to catch it before it disappears into the numerous cracks and crevices of my old apartment.
sentences.translation: 如果我伸手抓它，它会飞快逃走；我怀疑自己能否在它钻进旧公寓无数裂缝之前抓住它。

structure.text: If I try to grab it
whether I'll be able to catch it
before it disappears into the numerous cracks and crevices of my old apartment

difficult_points: whether 从句作 doubt 的宾语。
before 从句限定抓住它的最后时限。

sentences.sentence: So, I carefully remove my slipper, determined to squash the insect, but then almost scream again as it lifts on its legs, raises membranous wings, and with a loud buzzing noise, flies away.
sentences.translation: 于是我小心脱下拖鞋，决心拍死它；但当它撑起身体、展开膜状翅膀，并伴着响亮嗡嗡声飞走时，我又差点尖叫。

structure.text: as it lifts on its legs, raises membranous wings, and with a loud buzzing noise, flies away

difficult_points: determined ... 描述主语意图。
as 从句中 lifts、raises、flies 三个谓语并列。

sentences.sentence: Oh, just what I need they can fly, too.
sentences.translation: 哦，真是正合我意——它们居然还会飞。
difficult_points: just what I need 是反语，表达更加无奈而非真正需要。
原文两个分句之间缺少标点，须原样保留。
